what: Build hierarchical knowledge index from metadata
why: Organize validated entries into a structured index for efficient search and retrieval

output.console: Index structure summary with category tree and entry counts

success_handling.criteria: Hierarchical index is built from validated metadata with categories, tags, and entry references organized for efficient lookup

event.message: Knowledge index built: {entry_count} entries in {category_count} categories

error_handling.criteria: Unable to organize entries into hierarchical structure (e.g., circular references, invalid category paths)
error_handling.action: Fall back to flat index without hierarchy, log error with details

event.message: Failed to build hierarchical index, falling back to flat index: {error}

decisions.outcome: Use flat index as fallback, proceed to write-index step
